name: Pixel Apps
subtitle: Good Apps. Amazing Innovation.
description: In here, we find uses people want on their device, and we make those uses and the power of your devices to the fullest as ever can.

apps.name: YT for TV
apps.subtitle: YouTube for TV on iPad
apps.localizedDescription:
YouTube for TV (YT for TV)
This app provides the TV interface of YouTube but on iPadOS, with a dedication remote to navigate.

Features:
1. A great onscreen remote: To navigate the TV-optimized layout, we added a touchable remote with the essential buttons for YouTube, like ESC, Playback, OK, and Arrow buttons, you can hide the remote, and it automatically hides when you are playing a video, and shows when you press show.
2. Touchscreen Capabilities: For the elements reachable, we designed a layer of touchscreen initialization to tap what’s reachable, and what’s hard on remote (like typing or searching)
3. Full YouTube for TV features: Every feature (except blur) is included here, YouTube Kids, Captions, Casting to TV, and etc.

versions.localizedDescription: This is the first version, see the description for more details.
